responses: Hello! How can I help you with Al-Hikmah University today?
Hi there! What information do you need about Al-Hikmah University?
Good day! I am the Al-Hikmah Admin Bot. How can I assist you?
Hello! Ask me anything about admissions, fees, results, or university services.
Goodbye! Have a great day!

patterns: What do I need to apply?
Can I get admitted without mathematics?
How many O level credits do I need?
What subjects are required for admission?
What is the cut off mark?
What is the minimum JAMB score?
Can I apply with awaiting result?
What are the conditions for admission?
responses: To gain admission into Al-Hikmah University, you need: (1) A minimum of five O'level credits including English Language and Mathematics at not more than two sittings. (2) A valid JAMB UTME score — the minimum cut-off mark is typically 160, though competitive programmes like Medicine and Law require higher scores. (3) A pass in the Al-Hikmah University Post-UTME screening exercise. Additional subject requirements apply per programme — for example, Medicine requires Biology, Chemistry and Physics, while Law requires Literature or Government. Direct Entry applicants must have an OND, NCE, HND or A-Level qualifications in relevant subjects.

Admission requirements at Al-Hikmah University include five O'level credits (including English and Mathematics), a valid JAMB score, and passing the Post-UTME screening. Medicine, Nursing and Law programmes have stricter subject and score requirements. Visit the Admissions Office or the university website to confirm requirements for your specific programme.

patterns: What can I study at the university?
Which departments are in the university?
Tell me about the available programmes
What is the best course to study?
Which faculties exist in the school?
I want to study cyber security
responses: Al-Hikmah University offers programmes across 10 Faculties: (1) Faculty of Computing, Engineering and Technology — Computer Science, Cyber Security, Software Engineering, Information Systems. (2) College of Health Sciences — Medicine (MB;BS). (3) Faculty of Health Sciences — Public Health, Medical Laboratory Science, Human Anatomy, Human Physiology. (4) Faculty of Nursing Sciences — Nursing Science. (5) Faculty of Law — Common Law, Common and Islamic Law. (6) Faculty of Management Sciences — Accounting, Banking and Finance, Business Administration, Economics. (7) Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences — English, Arabic, Mass Communication, Political Science, Sociology, History. (8) Faculty of Education — Educational Management, Computer Science Education, Library Science. (9) Faculty of Natural and Applied Sciences — Microbiology, Biochemistry, Industrial Chemistry, Geology, Physics, Statistics. (10) Faculty of Agriculture — Agriculture. Visit the university website for the full programme list and entry requirements.

Al-Hikmah University has programmes in Computing and Technology, Medicine, Nursing, Law, Management Sciences, Natural Sciences, Humanities, Education, and Agriculture. Popular courses include Computer Science, Cyber Security, Medicine (MB;BS), Law, Accounting, and Nursing Science. Visit the official website at alhikmah.edu.ng for the complete list.

patterns: How do I register for courses?
I need to add a course
How do I enrol for my subjects?
Where do I register my courses?
Steps to complete my course registration
I have not registered my courses yet
My course registration is not complete
When is the deadline for course registration?
Can I register courses after the deadline?
Registration is not opening for me
Why can't I register my courses?
I want to drop a course
How do I add an extra unit?
responses: To register your courses at Al-Hikmah University: (1) Ensure your school fees are fully paid and your portal is cleared. (2) Log into the student portal at the university website. (3) Navigate to Course Registration and select your courses for the current semester. (4) Ensure you do not exceed your maximum unit load — typically 24 units per semester. (5) Submit and print your course registration form for your records. Note: You cannot register if you have an outstanding fee balance or a carry-over debt. Visit the Academic Affairs office if you encounter any issues.

Course registration is done online through the Al-Hikmah student portal. You must clear all outstanding fees before the portal allows registration. Select your courses carefully — ensure you include compulsory courses and do not exceed your unit limit. Registration deadlines are published in the academic calendar. Late registration attracts a penalty fee.

patterns: How much does the school cost?
What is the cost of studying here?
How do I pay my school fees?
When is the deadline for fee payment?
How much is the acceptance fee?
How much is the school fees for 400 level?
Is fees the same for all departments?
How do I generate a payment invoice?
Which bank do I pay school fees?
What happens if I don't pay on time?
responses: School fees at Al-Hikmah University vary by faculty and programme. As a general guide: Medicine (MB;BS) — approximately ₦1,200,000 to ₦1,800,000 per session. Law and Health Sciences — approximately ₦1,000,000 to ₦1,500,000. Computing and Engineering — approximately ₦600,000 to ₦850,000. Humanities and Management Sciences — approximately ₦450,000 to ₦600,000. Fees are paid via the Remita platform — log into your student portal to generate your invoice and make payment. Fees must be paid in full before course registration opens.

Al-Hikmah University fees differ by department. To pay: (1) Log into your student portal. (2) Go to Fee Payment and generate your invoice. (3) Pay via Remita using your bank, mobile banking, or POS. (4) Your portal will be cleared automatically once payment is confirmed. For fee enquiries, contact the Bursary office directly.

patterns: How do I get a bed space?
Can I apply for a room on campus?
I did not get hostel space
How do I know if I got a room?
Is there hostel for postgraduate students?
responses: Hostel accommodation at Al-Hikmah University is not compulsory but is available for interested students. The university has separate male and female hostels on campus. To apply: (1) Log into your student portal. (2) Navigate to Hostel Application under Student Services. (3) Select your preferred hostel type and submit. (4) Pay the hostel fee once allocated — hostel fees are separate from tuition fees. Hostel spaces are limited and allocated on a first-come, first-served basis, so apply as early as possible at the start of each session. Students who do not get hostel can live off-campus in the university community.

Hostel at Al-Hikmah University is optional — students can choose to live on campus or off campus. On-campus hostels include male and female blocks with shared facilities. Application is done through the student portal at the beginning of each session. Due to high demand, early application is strongly advised. Contact the Student Affairs office for hostel availability and fee details.

patterns: What are the semester break dates?
What day does the semester end?
responses: The academic calendar including semester start dates, exam periods, and holidays is published on the Al-Hikmah University official website.
For exam timetables, resumption dates, and semester schedules, please check the university website or your departmental notice board as these are updated each session.

patterns: How do I apply for financial support?
Is there any fee waiver for students?
How can I reduce my tuition cost?
What is the GPA required for scholarship?
responses: Al-Hikmah University does not currently offer scholarships or bursaries. However, students may explore external funding options such as the Federal Government Scholarship Board, Kwara State Government Scholarship, TETFUND, and other private foundation grants. Contact the Student Affairs office for guidance on external funding opportunities.

There are no scholarships currently offered by Al-Hikmah University. Students seeking financial support are advised to apply for external scholarships through the Federal Government, Kwara State Government, or TETFUND. Visit the Student Affairs office for more information.

patterns: How can I reach the university?

responses: You can contact Al-Hikmah University at info@alhikmah.edu.ng or visit the official website for departmental contact numbers and office addresses.
Al-Hikmah University is located in Ilorin, Kwara State, Nigeria. For specific departmental contacts including the Registrar, Bursary, or Student Affairs, please check the official university website.
